name: Loquat Jam
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the loquats.
2. Scald, peel and remove seeds from the fruit.
3. Force the fruit through a food chopper using the coarse blade.
4. Combine the ground fruit, sugar, and water in a saucepan.
5. Bring the mixture to a boil and continue boiling rapidly until it sheets from the side of the spoon.
6. Pour into hot sterilized jars and seal.
Makes about 2 (1/2 pint) jars.
